title: Fix gpclub.vn homepage freeze

close_reason: Completed homepage freeze remediation: lazy-loaded public engagement widgets, deduplicated catalog products with React Query, deferred Gippy chat data until open, limited popup query, verified lint/build/runtime smoke, and completed review with no findings.

comments.author: PC

title: Add admin-managed hero image editing

Manual authenticated admin/Supabase browser checks were not executed and remain documented in progress.txt.

title: Normalize brand management and product filtering

title: Progressive page shell loading

close_reason: Completed shared skeleton loading contract: static public shells render immediately, dynamic sections use shared skeletons while loading, final build/scoped lint/smoke checks passed.

title: Implement full admin CMS i18n workflow
